dialogue.speaker: inner
dialogue.text: I'm finally here in Panay Island... and finally I get to meet with Uncle Yuyu.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: {player}! You made it! Welcome to my little junkshop.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: People call the things out back junk. I call them history waiting for a second heartbeat.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Walk around the scrapyard and grab a piece of scrap. The shinier the tier, the better the odds of a real find.

hint.speaker: yuyu
hint.text: Grab a piece of scrap, then hand it to Ayla.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Good eye! Ayla will have that sorted in no time — she hauls and sorts for me, best eyes on the island. Let's head inside the shop.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Ayla sorted your scrap into two pieces. Storage is small, so keep only one — the other goes back to the recycler.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Pick the one that looks more promising. Don't worry, you'll get plenty more chances to find treasures.

hint.speaker: yuyu
hint.text: Answer the door and sort the delivery: Keep or Recycle.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Now the real work. Take these - my old soft brush for dust, and a damp cloth for grime. They were my first tools too.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Sit at the workbench and let's wake this piece up.

hint.speaker: yuyu
hint.text: Open the workbench to start restoring.

hint.speaker: yuyu
hint.text: Pick the right tool for each condition and work the surface clean.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Clean! Now scan it with the phone. The scanner suggests what a thing is - but the final say is always yours, {player}. Never forget that.

hint.speaker: yuyu
hint.text: Scan the artifact and set your own verdict.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Good judgment. List it on the marketplace - buyers message you, you haggle, you decide.

hint.speaker: yuyu
hint.text: List the artifact on the marketplace and accept a buyer.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: This buyer wants it handed over in person at the mall. I have somewhere I need to be... so this delivery is yours alone.

dialogue.speaker: yuyu
dialogue.text: Take the tricycle out front. And {player} - whatever you find in this shop, take care of it for me.

hint.speaker: inner
hint.text: Ride the tricycle to the mall.

hint.speaker: inner
hint.text: Find the buyer and hand over the artifact.

dialogue.speaker: inner
dialogue.text: ...Tito Yuyu? Ayla? The shop is empty.

dialogue.speaker: inner
dialogue.text: He said he had somewhere to be. But his tools are still on the bench...

dialogue.speaker: inner
dialogue.text: There's a journal on the table. That wasn't there this morning.

hint.speaker: inner
hint.text: Read the journal on the table.
